text:
Permission is given for the local authority to disclose such documents as they consider necessary from the bundle to the person being assessed.

If the assessment is negative the local authority shall write to the person assessed informing them how they may apply to the court to challenge that assessment and the date and time of the next hearing in this matter.

The local authority is requested to fund a session of legal advice for one potential carer (or joint carers) for consideration of the legal basis upon which they seek to care for the child[ren].

The local authority must not undertake any further viability assessments without application to the court.

The local authority must arrange for any proposed special guardian to attend the hearing on [date] provided for above. The proposed special guardian must be sent a copy of the care plans for the child[ren] when [it is] / [they are] filed at court and served on the parties.

Appointment of the Official Solicitor as litigation friend

(Insert the following recitals into order)

[Name of expert]’s capacity assessment report dated [date] confirms [name] lacks capacity (within the meaning of the Mental Capacity Act 2005) to conduct the proceedings.

The court records that [name] is a protected party within the meaning of r.2.3 Family Procedure Rules 2010; that this is a case of last resort; and that [name] has the benefit of a legal aid certificate for representation in the proceedings.

(Within the body of the order)

The Official Solicitor is invited to act for [name], and shall, subject to their consent, be appointed to act.

The solicitors for [name] shall forthwith complete and send to the Official Solicitor the referral form for Children Act public law cases, together with the documents required by that form.

The solicitor for [name] shall keep the court informed as to their progress in meeting the Official Solicitor’s criteria for continuing to act and will notify the parties in the event of a delay in the Official Solicitor accepting appointment.

Additional Official Solicitor clauses

Because [name] is not publicly funded:

All parties shall cooperate with, and respond promptly to, any request by the Official Solicitor for information or documents to assist in establishing whether [name] would be eligible for legal aid or how their legal costs will otherwise be met.
